release.commit_message:
ci(docker): align anime image with current build workflows

Keep the soon-to-be-archived image buildable on the current shared base-image workflow stack and make the final image track the pushed warning source commit.

Constraint: The source warning commit had to be pushed first because the Docker workflow fetches public source archives by remote ref.

Rejected: Continue tagging source-only releases | the current sibling Docker repos use metadata commands to track moving upstream refs.

Confidence: high

Scope-risk: moderate

Directive: Before final archival, confirm the source branch SHA in meta.json is the intended final app source.

Tested: jq meta.json parse; Ruby YAML parse for workflows; bash -n scripts; meta commands match current values; GitHub source archive HEAD resolves; git diff --check.

Not-tested: Full Docker image build and GHCR smoke test locally.
